{{Infobox character
| name = King Zakareth the Fifth
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[King Zakareth the Fifth]] was killed by [[Valin the Wanderer]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
